Log.Location: "Oak Creek Rd / Tehachapi Willow Springs Rd"

details.IncidentDetail: "[1] OAK CREEK RD CLOSED FROM TEHACHAPI WILLOW SPRINGS RD TO CEMENT PLANT RD DUE TO SNOW AND ICE"
"[1] WOODFORD TEHACHAPI RD CLOSED FROM SR58 TO PINON CANYON RD DUE TO SNOW AND ICE"
"[1] WATER CANYON RD CLOSED FROM HIGHLINE RD TO SOUTH TO MOUNTAIN PARK DUE TO SNOW AND ICE"
"[1] TEHACHAPI WILLOW SPRINGS RD CLOSED FROM HIGHLINE RD TO BACKUS RD DUE TO SNOW AND ICE"
"[1] ROAD DEAD ENDS AT THE NORTH END OF LAKE ST AND OLD US HWY 395"
"[2] REDROCK RANDSBURG RD - CLOSED FROM SR14 TO US395 DUE TO STORM DAMAGE"
"[1] GARLOCK RD - CLOSED FROM REDROCK RANDSBURG RD TO US395 DUE TO STORM DAMAGE"
